package rulefixtures

// scenario for interface_slice_allocation: `[]interface{}` or `[]any` used to pass homogeneous typed data
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule604NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario604Negative(records []Rule604NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
